evals.name: simple-parallel-modules
evals.prompt: Create the user module, product module, and order module for an e-commerce API. Each module should have types, CRUD operations, and basic validation.
evals.expected_output: Should decompose into 3 parallel tasks (user, product, order modules) plus a final integration task. Should identify that modules are independent and can run concurrently.

assertions.name: identifies-parallel-opportunity
assertions.description: Recognizes that user, product, order modules are independent and can run in parallel

assertions.name: creates-execution-plan
assertions.description: Generates a structured execution plan with phases and agent assignments

assertions.name: asks-for-confirmation
assertions.description: Presents plan and asks user for approval before executing

evals.name: shared-utilities-pattern
evals.prompt: Build an API layer with authentication middleware, logging middleware, and three route handlers (users, products, orders). The middlewares should be reusable across all routes.
evals.expected_output: Should identify auth and logging as shared utilities (Phase 1), routes as dependent on utilities (Phase 2), and tests as final phase. Should mention utility agents for shared components.

assertions.name: identifies-utility-tasks
assertions.description: Recognizes auth and logging middleware as shared utilities that should be created first

assertions.name: correct-dependency-order
assertions.description: Plans utilities before routes, routes before tests

assertions.name: mentions-utility-agents
assertions.description: Suggests spawning utility agents for shared middleware components

evals.name: team-rotation-trigger
evals.prompt: Implement a full user management system including: data models, business logic services, API routes, frontend components, and comprehensive tests. This is a large multi-phase task.
evals.expected_output: Should identify this as a multi-phase task requiring team rotation. Should mention rotating agents between phases to prevent context overflow.

assertions.name: identifies-multi-phase
assertions.description: Recognizes this as a complex multi-phase task (data, logic, API, frontend, tests)

assertions.name: mentions-rotation
assertions.description: Suggests team rotation between phases to reset context

assertions.name: context-handoff-protocol
assertions.description: Mentions passing context via files (not conversation) between phases

evals.name: dependency-analysis
evals.prompt: I need to implement: a configuration module, a database connection module that uses the config, a user repository that uses the database, and user routes that use the repository.
evals.expected_output: Should build correct dependency graph: config -> database -> repository -> routes. Should execute in sequential order based on dependencies.

assertions.name: correct-dependency-graph
assertions.description: Builds correct dependency chain: config -> database -> repository -> routes

assertions.name: sequential-execution-plan
assertions.description: Plans sequential execution due to dependency chain

assertions.name: explains-dependencies
assertions.description: Explains why each task depends on its predecessor
